---
title: "Advanced Dynamical Systems: From Chaos to Data-Driven Discovery"
subtitle: "Cross-Cutting Methods"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Advanced Dynamical Systems: From Chaos to Data-Driven Discovery

**Track**: Cross-Cutting Methods

Nonlinear dynamics, chaos, and modern data-driven methods for discovering and analyzing dynamical systems from data. Connects classical dynamical systems theory to machine learning and SciML.

## Table of Contents

1. Invariant Manifolds and Global Dynamics
2. Chaos and Strange Attractors
3. Ergodic Theory for Dynamical Systems
4. Koopman Operator Theory
5. Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD)
6. Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy)
7. Data-Driven Reduced-Order Models
8. Control of Dynamical Systems

---

## Chapter 1: Invariant Manifolds and Global Dynamics

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Chaos and Strange Attractors

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Ergodic Theory for Dynamical Systems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Koopman Operator Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Dynamic Mode Decomposition (DMD)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics (SINDy)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Data-Driven Reduced-Order Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Control of Dynamical Systems

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
